response.justification: Candidate is a modern full-stack web engineer with nearly 11 years of recent experience in TypeScript, Node.js, and contemporary technologies. While communication skills are strong, they lack the mandatory C++ depth (only 6 months in 2015), Windows platform expertise, and critical financial-services domain knowledge. Career trajectory has moved entirely away from low-level systems programming toward web and DevOps, making this a fundamental skill mismatch.
strengths: Excellent communicator and mentor with proven ability to teach and share knowledge through workshops and open-source projects
Demonstrates senior-level software engineering maturity across multiple domains and platforms
Strong track record of building testable, maintainable systems with modern development practices (TDD, CI/CD)
concerns: C++ experience minimal (6 months at National Instruments in 2014–2015) with no recent work; role requires 5–10 years of active C++
No demonstrable Windows platform development experience; entire recent career is on Linux/macOS and web technologies
Zero exposure to capital markets, fixed-income products, or investment-banking systems; recent roles in web automation, data integration, and DevOps
